title: Unbroken Vows

sections.label: Intro
lines: (Avoid excessive brightness or reverb effects.)
I called on the name of the Lord,
In the shadows where fear takes hold,
Mercy heard my trembling soul,
Grace unfolded, made me whole.

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: When sorrow wove its heavy chains,
When despair sang through my veins,
I cried out in the night’s deep pain,
And love unbound me from the strain.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: The cords of death had wrapped so tight,
But His voice cut through the quiet night.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I will lift the cup of salvation high,
A promise unbroken beneath the sky.
He hears the cry of the low and weak,
His steadfast love is all I seek.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: He delivered me from endless fall,
From the silence, He answered my call.
I’ll walk in His light, forever sure,
In the land of the living, my heart secure.

sections.label: Bridge
lines: What can I give for all He’s done?
A vow of devotion under the sun.
I’ll pay my dues where His people meet,
His love alone makes my joy complete.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: I will lift the cup of salvation high,
A promise unbroken beneath the sky.
He hears the cry of the low and weak,
His steadfast love is all I seek.

sections.label: Outro
lines: I am His, and He calls me home,
Forever in mercy, I’m never alone.

epigraph: because he hath heard my voice and my supplications
